global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear call-to-action and game elements.
global.main_message: Encourages users to claim rewards with no ads in the first week.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Win epic rewards' is prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: A small logo for 'PixelForge' appears at the top left corner, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: Bonus badge
elements.description: A bright yellow 'BONUS' badge is positioned at the top right, drawing attention with its contrasting color.

elements.label: Game screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot of a game interface is displayed in the center, showcasing a grid of game elements.

elements.label: Game screenshot
elements.description: Another screenshot of the game interface is shown, complementing the first with additional game elements.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main headline reads 'No ads in first week', providing additional information.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Claim reward' is located at the bottom, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element positioned in the center, possibly decorative or functional.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another small, unclear element at the top, likely serving a decorative purpose.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element at the top, possibly decorative or functional.

elements.label: Reward message
elements.description: The text 'Claim reward' is displayed in a clear, inviting font at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Win epic rewards No ads in first week

elements.label: PixelForge branding
elements.description: The 'PixelForge' branding appears at the top left, reinforcing brand identity.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A clear call-to-action button labeled 'Claim reward' is positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Bonus offer
elements.description: A bright yellow 'BONUS' badge is displayed at the top right, highlighting a special offer.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the logo and bonus badge, with game screenshots in the center and the CTA at the bottom.
